title: That Girl Morning Smoothie Prep
description: Cinematic over-the-shoulder shot of a chic Turkish woman slicing fresh fruit for a smoothie in a bright Scandinavian kitchen — 8-second clean plate for CapCut.

prompt.concept: A bright, cinematic over-the-shoulder shot looking down at a kitchen island where a chic Turkish woman is slicing fresh fruit for a smoothie. The camera peers just over her shoulder, capturing her hands, the cutting board with vibrant fruits, and the sunlit kitchen counter. Her face is partially visible in a three-quarter profile. Morning sunlight streams across the white countertop. No talking, no overlays — just the rhythm of the prep.

character.hair: messy high bun, honey-brown, a few loose strands falling around her neck and ears
character.skin: warm fair, fresh bare skin with a natural morning glow, no makeup
character.expression: calm focus on the task, slight contentment visible in her three-quarter profile
character.vibe: 'that girl' / healthy morning / Pinterest kitchen goals

wardrobe.top: loose cropped white t-shirt, slightly sheer from the morning light, no logos or text
wardrobe.bottoms: high-waisted sage-green linen lounge pants, partially visible
wardrobe.jewelry: thin gold chain necklace, a simple hair claw clip in tortoiseshell holding the bun

props.cutting_board: large wooden cutting board with sliced strawberries, a halved banana, a small pile of blueberries, and a few mint leaves
props.knife: simple chef's knife, ceramic or steel, no visible brand markings
on_counter: a clear glass blender jar (no brand logo) waiting to be filled
a small glass bottle of oat milk
a ceramic bowl of whole strawberries
a folded linen kitchen towel in cream
a small potted herb (basil or mint) in a white ceramic pot

details: white marble or quartz kitchen island countertop
light oak open shelving with a few ceramic jars and plates
a window above the sink letting in bright morning sun
a trailing pothos plant on the shelf edge

camera.shot: over-the-shoulder, looking down at about 30-degree angle toward the cutting board and counter
camera.rig_feel: as if someone is standing just behind her right shoulder, looking over and down
camera.framing: her right shoulder and partial profile in the left edge of frame (slightly soft), the cutting board and her hands centered, kitchen counter extends to the right
camera.lens_feel: 50mm equivalent, natural perspective, moderate depth of field — hands and food in sharp focus, background kitchen softly out of focus
camera.focus: sharp on her hands and the fruit on the cutting board

lighting.key: bright morning sunlight streaming from a window to the right, casting crisp highlights on the white counter and the fruit
lighting.fill: bounce from the white countertop and tiles illuminating from below
lighting.mood: bright, fresh, energizing, clean morning light
lighting.highlights: vivid color pop on the red strawberries and green mint, bright gleam on the knife blade, sun catching the glass blender

action_timeline.beat: static shot: her hands place a strawberry on the cutting board, she picks up the knife
she slices the strawberry in smooth, deliberate cuts — satisfying ASMR-like precision, juice glistening
she sweeps the sliced strawberries off the board into the blender jar with the flat of the knife
she reaches for the blueberries, drops a handful into the blender, a few bouncing slightly
she pauses, her head tilts slightly as if admiring the colorful arrangement in the blender — moment holds

ambient_sounds: soft thud of fruit being placed
gentle clink of the glass blender
faint birdsong from the open window

no_text_no_graphics.logos: NONE (no brand marks on any kitchen items)
no_text_no_graphics.note: deliver a clean plate — all text and graphics will be added later in CapCut

audio.ambient: knife cuts, fruit sounds, birdsong, quiet kitchen tone
